title: Company acquires Chicago logistics center
content: The company acquired a 500000 square foot logistics property in Chicago expanding its industrial portfolio.

title: Expansion in Texas market
content: The company announced expansion into the Austin market with two new retail developments.

title: New office development in Seattle
content: The company announced a new office property development in Seattle targeting technology companies.

title: Quarterly earnings update
content: The company reported strong quarterly earnings driven by industrial property revenue.
